assets.description: Light upward whoosh — layered triangle sweep (350-700Hz) + filtered noise burst for breathy air quality
Soft thump / paw-on-grass — low sine sweep (180-80Hz) + muffled crinkle noise texture
Friendly two-note chime (C5-E5) with 2nd-harmonic bell shimmer

notes: All clips warm/cozy tone. Jump uses triangle wave for softness over sine. Land has grass-texture noise layer. Join chime uses major-third interval for friendliness. All normalized to -3 dBFS.
